items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham said the company is well-positioned to benefit from structural lithium demand tailwinds. He added that the market is not fully re

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: Grid energy storage demand is growing rapidly. Albemarle noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing. Jérôme Pécresse of Rio Tinto said lithium demand will be more balanced between EVs and energy storage in the next two years.

items.headline: Lithium mining concept stocks broadly fall, Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi raised investment opinion on Albemarle from High Risk to Buy, target $225. Market is underestimating Albemarle growth potential despite recent weakness in spot lithium prices. Global ESS production forecast to reach 950 GWh this year, 35% increase YoY.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at Kings Mountain and Antofalla. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027. RBC raised price target to $257.
